channel.title: Travel on Purple Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Travel on Purple Blog

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (II): Iguazu Falls, the Great Waters
item.description: This post mainly recounts the trip to Iguazu Falls.

item.title: Three Colors in Chiang Rai: White, Blue, and Black
item.description:
Recently, a close friend’s boyfriend came to Chiang Mai. They were planning to rent a car and drive to Chiang Rai, and invited me to join them. The itinerary was extremely simple and straightforward: the White Temple, the Blue Temple, and the Black House. Once we finished visiting the three places, we’d head straight back.

My willpower, unfortunately, was weak. I let myself get dragged into the trip, abandoning the articles I was supposed to read and the work waiting for me. And just like that, I became the shining third wheel.

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (I): Buenos Aires, South America’s Purple City
item.description: Having just wrapped up my trip to Argentina, it felt both like a reunion with old friends and a brand-new adventure.

item.title: Da Nang Tết Survival Guide: How I Learned the Hard Way to Avoid Becoming a 'Sitting Duck'
item.description: The Lunar New Year in Da Nang felt like a high-stakes trial. Despite the physical toll of illness and anxiety, my soul found healing in conversations that transcended borders.
